_README: Each key is an invite code. Send each guest/family a link ending in ?c=THEIRCODE — e.g. https://yoursite.netlify.app/?c=diba . 'title' is shown as a greeting. 'members' is the list of people on that invitation. For a single guest, just give one member. Codes are case-insensitive. Keep them short, memorable, and hard to guess if you like (you can add numbers).
